user_goal: B028 Real Data Backfill — 利用 B027 已落地的 TiingoSnapshotLoader + cost guard，把 Master 4 sleeve ETF + B025 us_quality_momentum 30-50 ticker + US-listed ADR proxy（合计 50-80 ticker）的 10+ 年历史日线 OHLCV backfill 到本地 fixture-shaped unified 层 + 加 yfinance cross-check 抽样验证 + 加 PIT loader enforcement。Stream 1.B / Phase 1 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第三个 batch)。**不做** strategy 代码切真数据（留 B030）/ 财务 snapshot（留 B029）/ 每日 EOD cron（推迟）。本批次 4 features：(F001) yfinance loader + cross-check script + v0.9.29 §12.8 走规约 (pyproject [project].dependencies 加 yfinance + safety regression test 守门)；(F002) Backfill driver (scripts/backfill_prices.py) + Storage 双层 (data/snapshots/{prices,fundamentals}/{vendor,unified}/) + universe_master.py + 本机跑通 50-80 ticker × 10+ 年 + validate_snapshot 抽样 25 (ticker, date) cross-check PASS；(F003) PIT loader enforcement (trade/data/loader.py 加 as_of_date 参数 + 读 unified.csv else fixture + filter df.date <= as_of_date) + B025 us_quality 回测 deterministic 不变；(F004) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.29：** AI 5 子条 + 系统层 + UI 层 + 数据 CI 层 (含 §12.8 pyproject runtime vs dev dep hygiene 守门) + 产品边界 (B027 起 (f)(g))。决策矩阵（2026-05-26 用户已批）：backfill 范围=Master 4 sleeve ETF + B025 + ADR proxy 50-80 ticker / yfinance cross-check=抽样 3-5 ticker × 5 日期 误差 <0.5% / Storage=双层 vendor/unified / PIT=loader 层 enforcement + pytest spot check。B026 banner 仍 enable 不破。F001+F002+F003 generator，F004 codex。预估 1 个中等批次。
generator_handoff: B028 F001 done at commit (latest main HEAD). Gates: backend pytest 292+2 skipped (B027 baseline 277 → +15) / ruff + mypy clean on 135 source files / trade 727 + frontend vitest 166 unchanged. Boundary: B027 tiingo_loader / cost_guard / tiingo_budget_log untouched; B025 fixture untouched; strategy / B026 banner / production deploy untouched. F002 next: scripts/backfill_prices.py + scripts/universe_master.py + data/snapshots/{prices,fundamentals}/{vendor,unified}/ layout + manual one-shot backfill + scripts/validate_snapshot.py run against real data → docs/test-reports/B028-cross-check-2026-MM-DD.md + ≥10 specs.

session_notes.generator: 2026-05-26 B028 F001 完成（feat commit；7 files +文件）。实施：(a) workbench_api/data/yfinance_loader.py YFinanceSnapshotLoader 继承 SnapshotLoader；走 yfinance.Ticker(t).history(start, end, auto_adjust=False, actions=False)，end +1 天补足 inclusive；future to_date clamp to today；missing required columns {Open,High,Low,Close,'Adj Close',Volume} ValueError 含 ticker；空 DataFrame ValueError；row.iterrows 映射到 frozen PriceBar (close=raw, adj_close=Adj Close)；health_check try yf.Ticker('SPY').info → True if dict 非空 else False，捕获任意异常返回 False（兼容 Yahoo 限流）。无 cost guard（yfinance
